programme.desc: Um detetive de Hong Kong se une a um jogador americano para lutar contra um notório criminoso chinês.

programme.title: Deus da guerra, (2017, Adventure)
programme.desc: Na dinastia Ming, onde o jovem general Qi Jiguang conquista uma importante vitória contra os piratas japoneses, comandando o exército chinês. Quando, quatro anos depois, sua nação é mais uma vez atacada, Qi se vê obrigado a retornar aos campos de batalha.

programme.title: Arthur & Merlin: Cavaleiros de Camelot, (2020, Adventure)
programme.desc: Um Rei Arthur muito mais velho retorna para casa após lutar contra o Império Romano. Seu filho ilegítimo corrompeu o trono de Camelot. Agora o Rei Arthur deve se reunir com o mago Merlin e os Cavaleiros da Távola Redonda e lutar para recuperar sua coroa.

programme.title: D Artagnan O Quarto Mosqueteiro, (2022, Children)
programme.desc: A mando de seu pai, o jovem d’Artagnan viaja da Gasconha rural para Paris, onde se envolve em uma trama desonesta entre os mosqueteiros do rei e os guardas do cardeal Richelieu.

programme.title: Tudo pela Honra, (2003, Adventure)
programme.desc: O habilidoso espadachim e mulherengo Fanfan La Tulipe é obrigado a se juntar ao exército do rei Luís XV pela trambiqueira Adeline La Franchise , que o convence dizendo que assim se casará com uma das filhas do rei.

programme.title: Hitman - O Rei dos Assassinos, (1998, Action)
programme.desc: Um antigo chefe da máfia japonesa suspeita de ser vítima de um ataque e deixa uma recompensa para a pessoa que encontrar o seu assassino.

programme.title: Aliança Mortal, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: Um grande carregamento de drogas desaparece entre a fronteira Canadá-Estados Unidos. Os traficantes de drogas que o procuram obrigam um guarda florestal, um ex-membro das Forças Especiais, a ajudá-los a encontrar a droga.

programme.title: Retroceder Nunca, Render-se Jamais, (1986, Action)
programme.desc: Jason Stillwell é um fã de Bruce Lee e jovem aprendiz de artes marciais. Após seu pai negar participar de uma gangue de criminosos, eles se mudam de cidade, onde Jason encontrará problemas.

programme.title: Guardiã, (2015, Action)
programme.desc: Uma artista marcial cujo marido policial disfarçado foi assassinado não irá parar até proteger sua única filha dos assassinos que a perseguem.

programme.title: Dupla em Fúria, (2013, Action)
programme.desc: Uma onda de assassinatos sacode Hong Kong. O jovem detetive Wang Bu Er tem certeza de que eles são o trabalho de um assassino em sériee, junto com Huang Fei Hong, um mestre do kung, eles empreendem uma aventura em ritmo acelerado para investigar o caso.

programme.title: Kickboxer: A Retaliação, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Kurt Sloan prometeu a si mesmo que não voltaria para a Tailândia, mas alguém o seda e o força a retornar ao país asiático.

programme.title: A Hora do Acerto, (2004, Action)
programme.desc: Para a Gangue dos 5, tudo é um videogame: matar policiais, armar emboscadas e criar requintes de crueldade. Quem se torna vítima de suas armadilhas é o inspetor de polícia Wing e todo o seu time de policiais, que são brutalmente assassinados.

programme.title: O Legado do Grande Mestre, (2018, Action)
programme.desc: Mantendo-se discreto depois de ter sido derrotado por Ip Man, Cheung Tin Chi mete-se em sarilhos depois de se envolver numa luta com um estrangeiro poderoso.

programme.title: Aliança Mortal, (2014, Action)
programme.desc: Um grande carregamento de drogas desaparece entre a fronteira Canadá-Estados Unidos. Os traficantes de drogas que o procuram obrigam um guarda florestal, um ex-membro das Forças Especiais, a ajudá-los a encontrar a droga.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night, (1967, Crime)
programme.desc: Sidney Poitier and Rod Steiger (who won a Best Actor Oscar® for his performance) shine in this classic mystery-thriller that took home five Academy Awards®, including Best Picture and Best Adapted Screenplay. Lee Grant and Warren Oates also star.

programme.title: Marty, (1955, Romance)
programme.desc: Ernest Borgnine won a Best Actor Oscar for his role as a Bronx butcher who gives up on love, until he meets an equally lonely school teacher in this charming story that garnered a total of four Oscars including Best Picture.

programme.title: The Miracle Worker, (1962, Drama)
programme.desc: Academy Awards went to Best Actress Anne Bancroft and Best Supporting Actress Patty Duke for their moving portrayals of Annie Sullivan and her remarkable blind and deaf pupil, Helen Keller.

programme.title: Arrivederci, Baby!, (1966, Comedy)
programme.desc: A con man who marries and murders rich women meets a con lady with similar intentions.

programme.title: Sweet Smell of Success, (1957, Crime)
programme.desc: A columnist and a press agent tear into the maelstrom of midtown Manhattan's night creatures in a sinister game that involves money, power and ultimately survival.

programme.title: Artists and Models, (1955, Comedy)
programme.desc: A goonish young man receives telepathic top secret information in his nightmares, which are used by his artist friend in comic strips. Foreign agents and the CIA get interested.

programme.title: Pardners, (1956, Comedy)
programme.desc: A rich momma's boy returns west with the son of his murdered father's partner to foil a gang trying to gain control of his family ranch. They accidentally clean up the town.

programme.title: Hollywood Or Bust, (1956, Comedy)
programme.desc: A movie-mad nitwit driving across the country to his mecca, Hollywood, is joined by a gambler who wants to break into singing when they pick up a pretty girl en route. Once in Hollywood the nitwit meets his dream goddess.

programme.title: Father Goose, (1964, Comedy)
programme.desc: Cary Grant stars in one of his funniest roles as a boozy beachcomber sitting out WWII in peace - until the Allies recruit him to be a lookout on the South Pacific isle.

programme.title: Clear and Present Danger, (1994, Action)
programme.desc: When his mentor Admiral James Greer becomes ill, Ryan is appointed acting CIA Director of Intelligence.

programme.title: Jack Ryan: Shadow Recruit, (2014, Thriller)
programme.desc: Jack Ryan must quickly evolve from soldier to analyst to full-fledged operative to stop a devastating terrorist plot against the United States.

programme.title: Death Warrant, (1990, Action)
programme.desc: Action superstar Jean-Claude van Damme ("Bloodsport", "Cyborg") is a veteran undercover cop posing as an inmate in a dangerously corrupt state prison.

programme.title: Crank, (2006, Action)
programme.desc: Today is the last day of hit man Chev Chelios' life. He has been given a poison that will kill him if he allows his heart to settle into a normal rhythm. In order to stay alive and take revenge, Chev must keep his adrenaline elevated by any way possible.

programme.title: One More Shot, (2024, Action)
programme.desc: A Navy SEAL fights off airport terrorists planning to bomb the State of the Union address.

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick, (2022, Adventure)
programme.desc: Pete "Maverick" Mitchell keeps pushing the envelope after years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators. He must soon confront the past while training a new squad of graduates for a dangerous mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice.

programme.title: Triple 9, (2016, Action)
programme.desc: When a bank-robbing crew of corrupt cops and ex-Special Forces must attempt a nearly impossible heist for a ruthless mobster, their only hope of survival is to distract the entire Atlanta police force with a “999” — cop code for “officer down.”

programme.title: Braveheart, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: William Wallace, a commoner, unites the 13th Century Scots in their battle to overthrow English rule.

programme.title: The Haunting In Connecticut, (2009, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: After a family is forced to relocate for their son's health, they begin experiencing supernatural behavior in their new home, which turns out to be a former mortuary and séance parlor.

programme.title: The Eye, (2008, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: A blind girl receives a cornea transplant so that she is able to see again. However, she gets more than she bargains for when she realizes she can see disturbing ghosts.

programme.title: The Ruins, (2008, Teen Screams)
programme.desc: "The Ruins" follows a group of friends who become entangled in a struggle for survival after visiting a remote archaeological dig in the Mexican jungle where they discover something deadly living among the ruins.

programme.title: My Bloody Valentine, (2009, Slashers and Serial Killers)
programme.desc: A remake of George Mihalka's 1981 classic slasher film, MY BLOODY VALENTINE takes place ten years after a devastating coal mining accident when a string of gruesome murders plagues a town.

programme.title: Hush, (2016, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: A deaf and mute writer who retreated into the woods to live a solitary life must fight for her life in silence when a masked killer appears at her window.

programme.title: The Haunting In Connecticut, (2009, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: After a family is forced to relocate for their son's health, they begin experiencing supernatural behavior in their new home, which turns out to be a former mortuary and séance parlor.

programme.title: Deliver Us from Evil, (2014, Supernatural Horror)
programme.desc: A NYPD officer (Eric Bana) and unconventional priest Mendoza (Edgar Ramírez) who join forces to investigate a series of disturbing & inexplicable crimes. Together, they must combat the possessions that are terrorizing their city before it's too late.

programme.title: The Ruins, (2008, Teen Screams)
programme.desc: "The Ruins" follows a group of friends who become entangled in a struggle for survival after visiting a remote archaeological dig in the Mexican jungle where they discover something deadly living among the ruins.

programme.title: Texas Chainsaw, (1970, Horror)
programme.desc: A young woman inherits an isolated mansion from a distant relative, but an unspeakable horror awaits her in the mansion's dank cellars.

programme.desc: Lisa Lisa paints a picture of honor when she reveals Caesar’s tragic past to Joseph. Meanwhile, in the face of certain danger, Caesar enters into a solitary battle to avenge his father.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II, (1987, Comedy)
programme.desc: The heat's back on! And Eddie Murphy is cool as ever in this sizzling, smash-hit sequel to Beverly Hills Cop.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III, (1993, Action)
programme.desc: Eddie's back! So are the laughs. Eddie Murphy returns as Detroit cop Axel Foley, getting down with the fun-and-sun set as never before in this revved up thrill-ride of a movie.

programme.title: Vampire in Brooklyn, (1995, Comedy)
programme.desc: As the vampire Maximillian, the popular star is the most diabolical, dashing and definitely undead dude in the ‘hood’.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care, (2003, Comedy)
programme.desc: Two men get laid off and have to become stay-at-home dads when they can't find jobs. This inspires them to open their own day-care center.

programme.title: Dreamgirls, (2006, Musical)
programme.desc: With showstopping performances by a star-studded cast, Dreamgirls soars with the amazing story of three female singers who learn that anything is possible when you hold on to your dreams.

programme.title: Purple Rain, (1983, Musical)
programme.desc: Rock star Prince makes a spectacular feature film debut in this highly autobiographical blockbuster that won both an Oscar and a Grammy award.

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin', (2005, Musical)
programme.desc: Following a near-fatal gun battle, Marcus recalls his journey from orphaned street kid from the Bronx to making his mark in the drug trade to teaming up with a fellow ex-con (Terrence Howard) for his shot at becoming a successful rap artist.

programme.title: Hustle & Flow, (2005, Inspirational Drama)
programme.desc: The tale of DJay, a pimp whose hustle selling sexy Nola leaves him wondering if this is it for him. Only when he trades contraband for a keyboard and bumps into his old schoolfriend Key does he see a way out by laying down some tracks.

programme.title: Delta Force 2: The Colombian Connection, (1990, Military & War Action)
programme.desc: Chuck Norris is in peak form in this explosive action/adventure that brings back one of his most unforgettable characters, Delta Force Colonel Scott McCoy, for a daring mission to destroy a deadly drug cartel led by the ruthless Billy Drago!

programme.title: Firewalker, (1986, Adventure)
programme.desc: Two hapless soldiers of misfortune (Chuck Norris, Louis Gossett Jr.) meet a beautiful girl (Melody Anderson) with a map to a lost gold mine and decide to have one last shot at striking it rich. But the trail to the treasure is no yellow brick road!

programme.title: Bloodfist, (1989, Action)
programme.desc: Don Wilson plays retired kickboxer Jake Raye, who travels to Manila, where his brother is favored to win a kickboxing competition.

programme.title: Bloodfist II, (1990, Action)
programme.desc: The world kickboxing champion (Don "The Dragon" Wilson) retreats to Manila, lands in a mess, and fights his way out.

programme.title: Bloodfist III: Forced to Fight, (1992, Action)
programme.desc: An innocent half-Asian kickboxer (Don "The Dragon" Wilson) is caught between two other races at war in prison.

programme.title: Bloodfist VI: Ground Zero, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: A kickboxer (Don "The Dragon" Wilson) must prevent the launch of a nuclear missile by terrorists targeting New York.

programme.title: Bloodfist VII: Manhunt, (1995, Action)
programme.desc: Jim Trudell is a man pursued. Branded a cop-killer, he must fight simply to stay alive, and to clear his name - with the very police who framed him.

programme.title: Bloodfist VIII: Hard Way Out, (1996, Action)
programme.desc: Kickboxing champion Jake Raye thought his fighting days were over, until a call from an old friend draws him to the Far East and into the hands of a madman.

programme.title: Enter the Ninja, (1981, Action)
programme.desc: The absorbing martial arts film that exposes Ninjutsu, the lethal, little-known "Art of Invisibility"... which includes the use of hypnotism, explosives, and super-human fighting skills.

programme.title: Hot Rod, (2007, Comedy)
programme.desc: A comedy about a stunt man who’s never successfully landed a jump without wiping out and his attempt to master the biggest stunt of his life.

programme.title: Meatballs, (1978, Comedy)
programme.desc: Bill Murray stars as Tripper who guides a fun-seeking collection of lovable campers and libidinous staff members through the unique pleasures of a hysterical coed summer experience.

programme.title: Nacho Libre (ENG), (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: Jack Black is more hilarious than ever as Ignacio, a monastery cook who feeds orphan children by day and by night transforms himself into Nacho Libre, a notorious Luchador in stretchy pants.

programme.title: Good Burger, (1997, Comedy)
programme.desc: Kel are serving up laughs! They're the good guys in Good Burger, a zany comedy inspired by the popular Kel routine from Nickelodeon's hit series All That.

programme.title: Nacho Libre (ENG), (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: Jack Black is more hilarious than ever as Ignacio, a monastery cook who feeds orphan children by day and by night transforms himself into Nacho Libre, a notorious Luchador in stretchy pants.

programme.title: The Love Guru, (2008, Comedy)
programme.desc: A hilarious comedy starring Mike Myers as guru Pitka in his first original character since the blockbuster hit Austin Powers.

programme.title: Click, (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: When a harried workaholic is given a universal remote that allows him to pause, rewind, or skip past portions of his life, he discovers which parts are truly the best of his life.

programme.title: Walk Hard: The Dewey Cox Story, (2007, Comedy)
programme.desc: Dewey Cox had it all: the women (over 411), the friends (Elvis) and the rock 'n' roll lifestyle (every pill and powder). But most of all, he had the music that transformed a dimwitted country boy into the greatest American rock star who never lived.

programme.title: Hot Rod, (2007, Comedy)
programme.desc: A comedy about a stunt man who’s never successfully landed a jump without wiping out and his attempt to master the biggest stunt of his life.

programme.title: Runaway Bride, (1999, Romance)
programme.desc: Julia Roberts plays a small-town girl whose marches down the aisle become a series of near Mrs. when she bolts before saying "I do."

programme.title: The Cutting Edge, (1992, Romance)
programme.desc: Action and romance take to the screen when a self-centered ex-hockey star (D.B. Sweeney) and a prima donna champion figure skater (Moira Kelly) become unlikely partners in pursuit of Olympic gold.

programme.title: Center Stage, (2000, Romance)
programme.desc: The American Ballet Company is not for the fainthearted, it's for the most gifted and beautiful ballet dancers alive. But you'll need more than mere physical prowess and determination to succeed. PG-13

programme.title: Shall We Dance?, (2004, Romance)
programme.desc: John Clark is a meek workaholic who feels trapped in a dull, mind-numbing existence. One night, his whole life changes after the sight of a beautiful dance instructor inspire him to break out of his mold and sign up for some fancy footwork.

programme.title: Runaway Bride, (1999, Romance)
programme.desc: Julia Roberts plays a small-town girl whose marches down the aisle become a series of near Mrs. when she bolts before saying "I do."

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding, (1997, Romance)
programme.desc: Commitment-shy Jules Potter reluctantly realizes she is in love with her best friend Michael. There is just one catch: he's about to marry someone else. Jules will do anything to steal him back... except tell him the simple truth.

programme.title: Muriel's Wedding, (1994, Comedy)
programme.desc: In this perfect marriage of feel-good comedy and heartfelt drama, a shy daydreamer finds the courage to leave on a tropical vacation, where she meets a wacky new friend, changes her name, and turns her world upside down, all to an ABBA soundtrack.

programme.title: Rachel Getting Married, (2008, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: When Kym, returns to the Buchman family home for the wedding of her sister Rachel, she brings a long history of personal crises, family conflict, and tragedy along with her. Rated -R

programme.title: Kalifornia, (1993, Action)
programme.desc: Graduate student and his girlfriend set out on a cross-country roadtrip to research a book they are writing on serial killers. Along the way, they pick up an ex-con and his girlfriend who will take them on a ride they'll never forget.

programme.title: The Tailor of Panama, (2001, Thriller)
programme.desc: Based on the 1996 novel, this is a mixture of thriller and black comedy. Harry Pendel is the tailor to the powerful of Panama. Harry is known for his storytelling and suits, but soon his tales carry lethal repercussions.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky, (2001, Romance)
programme.desc: Young and wealthy, David can have anything his heart desires. But his life seems incomplete. One night, David meets the woman of his dreams and believes he may have found the missing piece.

programme.title: The Manchurian Candidate, (2003, Science fiction)
programme.desc: As the entire nation watches the presidential campaign hurtle towards Election Day, one soldier races to uncover the conspiracy behind it - a conspiracy that seeks to destroy democracy itself.

programme.title: Identity, (2003, Thriller)
programme.desc: What if every choice we ever make was already made for us? What if there really were no coincidences in life and our destinies were already predetermined? Ten strangers with secrets are brought together in a savage rainstorm. Rated: R

programme.title: Vanilla Sky, (2001, Romance)
programme.desc: Young and wealthy, David can have anything his heart desires. But his life seems incomplete. One night, David meets the woman of his dreams and believes he may have found the missing piece.

programme.desc: Matt Damon plays Rudy Baylor, a rookie lawyer in over his head on a high-profile case. Opposing him: an army of legal sharks. On Rudy’s side: Deck Shifflet, a feisty “paralawyer” who specializes in flunking the bar exam.

programme.title: The Killing of a Sacred Deer, (2017, Thriller)
programme.desc: A renowned surgeon (Colin Farrell), and his wife (Nicole Kidman) are terrorized by a depraved teenager determined to take revenge for a fatal mistake.

programme.title: Titanic, (1997, Romance)
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio and Oscar-nominee Kate Winslet light up the screen as Jack and Rose, the young lovers who find one another on the maiden voyage of the "unsinkable" R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan, (1998, Military & War Action)
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: Titanic, (1997, Romance)
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio and Oscar-nominee Kate Winslet light up the screen as Jack and Rose, the young lovers who find one another on the maiden voyage of the "unsinkable" R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.title: Saving Private Ryan, (1998, Military & War Action)
programme.desc: A World War II captain (Tom Hanks) and his squad (Edward Burns, Tom Sizemore) risk all to locate and send home a soldier whose three brothers died in combat.

programme.title: Dreamland, (2021, Crime)
programme.desc: Discovering a fugitive bank robber (Margot Robbie) is hiding in his small town, a young man is torn between claiming the bounty on her head and his growing attraction to the seductive criminal, in this epic love story set during the Great Depression.

programme.title: Eddie and the Cruisers, (1983, Independent Drama)
programme.desc: A reporter begins tracking down rumors of an unreleased album by a rock band whose charismatic leader disappeared after an accident and was presumed dead years before.

programme.title: El Dorado, (1966, Western)
programme.desc: Robert Mitchum plays to perfection an alcoholic but gutsy sheriff who relentlessly battles the dark side of the wild West, ruthless cattle barons and crooked “businessmen.”

programme.title: The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance, (1962, Western)
programme.desc: Jimmy Stewart plays the bungling but charming big-city lawyer determined to rid the fair village of Shinbone of its number one nuisance and bad man: Liberty Valance.

programme.title: Rio Lobo, (1970, Western)
programme.desc: This fifth and final collaboration between John Wayne and director Howard Hawks is an action-filled Western set after the Civil War, in which a group of men seek out Union traitors responsible for a string of train robbers.

programme.title: Heaven's Gate, (1981, Western)
programme.desc: This ambitious frontier epic features a lawman (Kris Kristofferson) and a hitman (Christopher Walken) who fight in a tragic class war between ranchers and starving immigrants.

programme.title: Texas Rangers, (2001, Western)
programme.desc: After the Civil War, Texas is at the mercy of murderous bandits. A group of unlikely heroes emerges to battle these renegade outlaws. Out-manned, they summon the courage to protect the innocent and put the wrong things right in their beloved homeland.

programme.title: South of Heaven, West of Hell, (2001, Western)
programme.desc: A small-town marshal, tormented by the puzzling conditions that surround him, is forced to confront his demons at an unexpected and untraditional 'family reunion'.

programme.title: True Grit, (2010, Drama)
programme.desc: True Grit is a powerful story of vengeance and valor set in an unforgiving and unpredictable frontier where justice is simple and mercy is rare.

programme.title: Brimstone, (2017, Western)

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade, (1989, Adventure)

programme.title: Hell Fest, (2018, Slashers and Serial Killers)
programme.desc: A serial killer in costume at a Halloween theme park kills off visitors, unbeknownst to bystanders who think it's part of the fun.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: The Shepherd has the upper hand in his duel with Lightning, but Lightning's ready to strike!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Playmaker and Ai detect a mysterious message from... the Earth Ignis? How is this possible when Earth was defeated and deleted by Gore?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! VRAINS
programme.desc: Gore's ready to risk everything to take down Playmaker – including short-circuiting his brain!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Go With the Flow, Part 1
programme.desc: It’s sink or swim for Yuma when he puts his deck on the line and challenges Shark, the school bully, to a duel. Can Yuma beat the school’s #1 duelist, or will Yuma’s life points get reeled in by this ruthless opponent?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Go With the Flow, Part 2
programme.desc: It’s a dueling disaster for Yuma when a mysterious visitor from another galaxy suddenly appears, putting his duel with Shark in serious jeopardy!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: In the End, Part 1
programme.desc: When the city is thrust into chaos after several of its computers become infected by a malicious virus, Yuma and Tori set out to find the culprit.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: In the End, Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma must outduel his math teacher before his life points are subtracted and the virus planted in the city’s computer system goes viral.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Flipping Out, Part 1
programme.desc: When fellow classmate Flip offers Yuma an Xyz Monster, Tori and Bronk warn Yuma to stay clear of this two-faced trouble maker.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Flipping Out, Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma must figure out a way to defeat Flip or risk losing his Utopia card… and Astral forever!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Sparrow, Part 1
programme.desc: When Nelson Andrews, star of the hit TV series “The Sparrow,“ becomes possessed by a Number Card, Yuma challenges him to a duel, putting Astral’s safety on the line.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Sparrow, Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma must figure out a way to defeat The Sparrow and his powerful Galaxy Queen before Nelson and Astral disappear forever!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Feline Frenzy
programme.desc: In order to find his missing friend Tori, Yuma must face off against a feline fanatic who has the purr-fect answers to his every move.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: Shark Attack
programme.desc: Yuma discovers that Shark has started running with the wrong crowd and given up dueling. Can Yuma hook Shark back into battling, or are Shark's dueling days done forever?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Pack, Part 1
programme.desc: When Yuma learns that Shark is going to be set up to take the fall for stealing a priceless deck, Yuma challenges Shark’s thug friends to a duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL: The Pack, Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma and Shark’s tag team battle against The Pack reaches a fevery pitch, for if Yuma loses, he also loses Utopia!

programme.title: A blind Kingbull fights with his last breath to get the Straw Hats one step closer to their captain. Luffy kick his body into second gear to protect his friends from dangerous foes!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Almost to luffy! Gather at the courthouse plaza!

programme.title: Luffy batters a baffled Blueno with his powerful new fighting style, and the cowardly Spandam begins to panic at the sound of the Straw Hats approaching!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Everything is to protect my friends! Second gear activated!

programme.title: Luffy and his crew are finally reunited and ready to rescue Robin, but the raven-haired beauty remains reluctant to rejoin her former mates despite Franky’s urging.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Give us your answer, robin! The straw hats' outcry!

programme.title: Flash back to Robin’s days as a young girl, her dangerous pursuit of forbidden knowledge, and her encounter with a friendly giant.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Robin's past! The girl who was called a devil!

programme.title: Robin’s flashback continues with the heartbreaking arrival of her mother – and the government’s cruel and brutal invasion of a peaceful island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fated mother and daughter! The mother's name is olvia!

programme.title: Professor Clover reveals a startling and sinister theory about the World Government, Robin reunites with her mother, and a giant joins the fight!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The tragedy of ohara! The terror of the buster call!

programme.title: The painful story of Ohara – and Robin’s younger years – draws to a tragic close. Luffy declares war on the World Government, and Robin finally changes her tune!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Say you want to live! We are your friends!

programme.title: The Straw Hats are ready to begin the fight for Robin, but first, Luffy flashes back to memories of his childhood – and the man who made him want to become a pirate!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Jump towards the falls! Luffy's feelings!

programme.title: Zoro remembers the first time he met Luffy, and Usopp recalls the events that led him to join the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: The ways of men! Zoro's techniques, usopp's dream!

programme.title: Nami’s heartbreaking past – and Luffy’s epic battle with Arlong – are recalled in this flashback to the early days of the Straw Hats!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A bond of friendship woven by tears! Nami's world map!

programme.title: A flashback sheds light on how Sanji came to join the crew, and Chopper’s backstory is revealed through memories of a visit to a snow-covered island!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Parting builds a man's character! Sanji and chopper!

programme.title: A flashback reveals Robin’s motives for cooperating with CP9, Nami’s shocking discovery about the archaeologist’s past, and Luffy’s determination to save his friend!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Everything is for her friends! Robin in the darkness!

programme.title: Franky stands up to Spandam by destroying what the madman desires most, and the sound of the sea train spurs the Straw Hats to make a daring leap of faith!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I'm not gonna hand over the blueprints! Franky's decision!

programme.title: Luffy races to rescue Robin while the rest of the Straw Hats set off in search of the five keys needed to unlock the archaeologist!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Obtain the five keys! The straw hat pirates vs. Cp9!

programme.title: While Usopp and Zoro go head-to-head with a couple of animal assassins, Sanji teaches the most beautiful member of CP9 the secrets of making good tea!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Devil fruit powers! Kaku and jabra transform!

programme.title: Luffy runs into trouble trying to sail his way to Robin, Usopp and Zoro end up handcuffed together, and Sanji’s inability to kick a women may lead to serious injury!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I won't kick even if it costs me my life! Sanji's chivalry!

programme.title: Chimney and Gombe show Luffy the secret passage that leads to Robin, and Franky puts on a display of raw punching power thanks to a few bottles of cola!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fukurou's miscalculation! My cola is the water of life!

programme.title: While Franky’s brawl spills into the ocean, Usopp and Sanji attempt to overcome their handcuffs by outsmarting their opponents!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Zoro busts out a new technique! The sword's name is sniper king?

programme.title: Determined not to be defeated by the heinous hair of a devious lion, Chopper risks life and limb by summoning the power of his Rumble Ball for a third time!
programme.desc: One Piece

programme.title: Travel back to ancient Japan for a madcap adventure starring the Straw Hats, some old friends and enemies, and a camel that eats lottery tickets!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Boss luffy returns! Is it a dream or reality? Lottery ruckus!

programme.title: The madcap throwback continues as Luffy and the gang – along with a crowd of characters from the Alabasta arc – competes for a priceless treasure hidden inside a tasty snack!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: A big rice cake tossing race at the castle! Red nose's plot!

programme.title: Nami battles a bathing beauty and her lethal bubbles, Chopper unleashes his inner beast, and Luffy inches ever closer to catching up with Robin!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Bubble master kalifa! The soap trap closes in on nami!

programme.title: Franky has a painful encounter with monster Chopper, and Nami gets scrubbed too clean to fight! Meanwhile, Spandam accidentally invokes the deadly Buster Call!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Resounding bad news! Buster call invoked!

programme.title: Zoro uses Usopp as a decoy in his battle with the beasts, and Nami discovers the secret that could be the key to survival in her brawl with the bathing beauty!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Five namis? Nami strikes back with mirages!

programme.title: Franky and Nami come up with a plan to stop Chopper’s rampage, but it could prove deadly to the not-so-little reindeer. Usopp and Zoro are thrilled to finally be free of each other!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Nami's decision! Fire at the out-of-control chopper!

programme.title: Usopp’s ill-advised attempt at bravery threatens to get him killed, but a familiar foot spares the sniper’s life. Luffy struggles to even strike a formidable foe, and Franky races to deliver some very important keys!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Hunter sanji makes an entrance? Elegy for a lying wolf!

programme.title: Sanji evens the playing field in his CP9 slugfest by introducing his wolfish opponent to the burning power of the devil’s leg!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fiery kicks! Sanji's full course of foot techniques!

programme.title: Zoro finally lands a blow against the killer giraffe, but Luffy still can’t find a way to break through against Lucci! Can Frank reach Robin before it’s too late!?
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Fierce sword attacks! Zoro vs. Kaku, powerful sword fighting showdown!

programme.title: Zoro unleashes a demonic nine sword fighting style on his giraffe opponent, Luffy buys time for Franky by ascending to second gear, and Robin refuses to give up hope of being rescued!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Demon god zoro! An incarnation of asura born from fighting spirit!

programme.title: Spandam cruely drags Robin ever closer to the gates of justice, but the battle takes a turn for the better when the Sniper King makes a surprise appearance!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Spandam frightened! The hero on the tower of law!

programme.title: Luffy’s battle with Lucci reveals the powerful secrets of the rubber man’s second gear, and the Spandam’s thoughtless Buster Call begins with a brutal barrage of cannonballs.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Robin freed! Luffy vs. Lucci, showdown between leaders!

programme.title: When an ancient tree is stolen by a madman with the power to freeze time, Luffy, Usopp, and Sanji track down the culprit in an attempt to save a village’s annual festival!
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: Boss luffy is the culprit? Track down the missing great cherry tree!

programme.title: Nami, Sanji, Usopp, Zoro, and company find themselves trapped in a tunnel filled with rapidly rising water. Meanwhile, Luffy musters the strength for one last stand in his battle with Lucci.
programme.desc: One Piece
programme.sub-title: I can't protect anyone unless i win! Third gear activated!

programme.title: Deep Impact, (1998, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When a couple of young astronomers discover an enormous comet on course to collide with Earth, the countdown to doomsday begins, and the human race embarks on the fight for survival.

programme.title: Mad Max, (1980, Action)
programme.desc: Max and the gang's worlds converge when the gang wants Max as badly as he wants them, especially after they target him for the death of their former leader.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence, (2001, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In a future world, humans share aspects of their lives with companion robots called Mechas. But when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family isn't prepared for the consequences.

programme.title: Deep Impact, (1998, Science fiction)
programme.desc: When a couple of young astronomers discover an enormous comet on course to collide with Earth, the countdown to doomsday begins, and the human race embarks on the fight for survival.

programme.title: The 6th Day, (2000, Action)
programme.desc: In the very near future, cattle, fish, and even the family pet can be cloned. But cloning humans is illegal - that is, until family man Adam Gibson comes home from work one day to find a clone has replaced him. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: The Fifth Element, (1997, Action)
programme.desc: Bruce Willis, Milla Jovovich, and Gary Oldman star in acclaimed director Luc Besson's outrageous sci-fi adventure, an extravagantly styled tale of good against evil set in an unbelievable twenty-third century world.

programme.title: Minority Report, (2002, Action)
programme.desc: In the future, a division of the police department has the technology to arrest killers before they commit crimes; however, the tables turn on one of the cops working within the division.

programme.title: Invitation to a Gunfighter, (1964, Western)
programme.desc: Screen legend Yul Brynner turns in a magnificent performance as a gunfighter who must do battle with his most formidable adversary - his own conscience - in this gripping, double-barreled western full of surprise twists and colorful villainy.

programme.title: Terror In A Texas Town, (1958, Western)
programme.desc: A greedy financier and a gang of gunmen force people to sell land.

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City, (1959, Western)
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, Bat Masterson (Joel McCrea) rolls into Dodge City with a chip on his shoulder and a gun on his hip. But soon, his mysterious past will catch up with him when an old friend calls in a favor...one that might cost him his life!

programme.title: The Toughest Gun In Tombstone, (1958, Western)
programme.desc: In lawless 1880s Arizona, an undercover captain infiltrates the West's most notorious outlaw gang. Building a ruthless reputation while hiding his true identity, he plays a deadly game of deception to bring down the brutal crew of killers.

programme.title: Fort Massacre, (1958, Western)
programme.desc: Joel McCrea gives a compelling performance as a cavalry sergeant apparently leading his men to safety, but actually slowly going mad in an insane attempt to avenge an Indian massacre.

programme.title: Gunfight At The O.K. Corral, (1957, Western)
programme.desc: Frontier lawman Wyatt Earp joins his three brothers in their feud against the villainous Clanton gang, a local clan of cattle thieves in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: The Unforgiven, (1960, Western)
programme.desc: John Huston directs Audrey Hepburn in this thrilling, romantic western about a woman who becomes the target of lawless racism and brutality when it is discovered that she was born to the Kiowa tribe but secretly adopted by a white frontier family.

programme.title: Warlock, (1959, Western)
programme.desc: An ex-outlaw (Richard Widmark) divides and challenges a quick-draw lawman (Henry Fonda) and his sidekick (Anthony Quinn).

programme.title: McLintock!, (1963, Western)
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: Blades of Glory, (2007, Comedy)
programme.desc: Two figure skating rivals are banned from the sport after a brawl over the gold medal. Joining forces, they find a loophole in the rules that allows them to skate again... as a pair!

programme.title: Dinner for Schmucks, (2010, Comedy)
programme.desc: There’s only one thing keeping aspiring executive Tim from corporate success. He must find the perfect guest to bring to his boss’s monthly dinner party, where the winner of the evening is the one who arrives with the biggest buffoon.

programme.title: The Longest Yard, (2005, Comedy)
programme.desc: The story of a pro quarterback and former college champion and coach are asked to put together a football team of inmates to take on the guards while doing their time in prison.

programme.title: The Ladies Man, (2000, Comedy)
programme.desc: Leon loses his radio show because of his X-rated on-air comments. He then gets a letter from a former flame promising him a lifetime of wealth and happiness, and things start looking up!

programme.title: RV, (2006, Comedy)
programme.desc: A forced family vacation in a recreational vehicle rapidly turns into a disaster.

programme.title: Eagle Eye, (2008, Action)
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf and Michelle Monaghan star as two strangers trying to escape danger when they are ripped from their ordinary lives and 'activated' as part of a hightech assassination plot.

programme.title: A.I. Artificial Intelligence, (2001, Science fiction)
programme.desc: In a future world, humans share aspects of their lives with companion robots called Mechas. But when an advanced prototype robot child named David is programmed to show unconditional love, his human family isn't prepared for the consequences.

programme.title: The 6th Day, (2000, Action)
programme.desc: In the very near future, cattle, fish, and even the family pet can be cloned. But cloning humans is illegal - that is, until family man Adam Gibson comes home from work one day to find a clone has replaced him. Rating: PG-13

programme.title: A small group, including Rick, runs into hurdles while trying to return to Alexandria, and some may not make it back.

programme.title: Morgan recalls his travels from King County to Alexandria, where he encountered a solo survivor who taught him a new code to live by.

programme.title: The sheltered citizens inside the walls of Alexandria must face a grim reality that might be too much for them to handle; Deanna doubts her leadership.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Daryl, Abraham and Sasha encounter many obstacles and a new threat while trying to return to Alexandria.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Alexandria is finally able to begin pulling itself back together; peace is embraced between the two groups.

programme.title: After a few moments of peace, trouble finds its way to Alexandria again with a threat that may be too big to defeat.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Now that walkers have shown up inside the gates of Alexandria, Rick and the other survivors are scared and outnumbered.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: A simple scavenging run proves to be more tricky, when the survivors are not the only ones after a goldmine of supplies.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: After realizing that Alexandria may not be as safe as he originally thought, Rick must make decisions about where to go.

programme.title: Rick and the others determine that the only way to keep peace in Alexandria, is to wage a war with a new enemy.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: After a minor success, two members of the group are taken hostage; Carol struggles morally with the lengths she has gone to survive.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Two separate groups leave Alexandria for supplies, and while both worry over the future of the community, they will face immediate danger.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: When someone goes missing in Alexandria, the community goes on alert, and search parties venture out.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: To save one of their own, Rick's group must venture outside the walls; their experience changes their lives forever.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: As the members of the group remain helpless, Negan takes action that will forever haunt those who survive.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead
programme.sub-title: The Day Will Come When You Won't Be

programme.title: For a number of familiar faces, a new, well-established community seems too good to be true.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: A new group of survivors seems to have it all in their impressive community; however, there is a price.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: The remaining members of the group try to keep it together in Alexandria; they receive a sobering visit.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Saddled with grief and surrounded by enemies, members of the group try to find safety at the Hilltop before it's too late.
programme.desc: The Walking Dead

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami brings Usagi and Rei to her favorite park. Rei decides to have a date with Mamoru at the park before it closes down.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Juban District is having a contest to decide who can design the best wedding dress. Usagi, Rei, and all the girls in town compete.
programme.sub-title: A Girl's Dream: Usagi Becomes a Bride

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A photographer named Kijin Shinokawa holds a modeling contest. All the girls who have entered begin disappearing after Shinokawa photographs them!
programme.sub-title: Usagi's a Model: The Flash of the Monster Camera

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Shingo’s friend Mika gives him a doll but Shingo unintentionally breaks the doll and hurts Mika’s feelings. Shingo decides to apologize.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi receives a love letter from Tuxedo Mask, stating that he’d like to meet her. She finds out that all the girls in town received the same letter.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Joy: A Love Letter from Tuxedo Mask

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The girls search for a vacation spot so they can focus on training. Instead, they settle on a mansion that has a very eerie service staff.
programme.sub-title: The Summer, the Beach, Youth and Ghosts

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Ami spots Nephrite and follows him to an animation studio that is making the Sailor V movie. Ami calls Usagi and Rei so they can investigate.
programme.sub-title: Protect the Children's Dreams: Friendship Through Anime

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Kingdom of Diamonds is hosting a party to reveal their treasure to the world. Both the Sailor Guardians and the Dark Kingdom crash the party.
programme.sub-title: Romance Under the Moon: Usagi's First Kiss

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Naru has fallen in love with Masato Sanjoin. Knowing that Sanjoin is really Nephrite, Usagi tries to convince Naru to give up on her feelings.
programme.sub-title: Wish upon a Star: Naru's First Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Nephrite uncovers Sailor Moon’s identity as Usagi. His attempt to finish her off is cut short when he learns that Naru has been kidnapped by Zoisite.
programme.sub-title: Naru's Tears: Nephrite Dies for Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: A new girl named Makoto Kino transfers to Usagi’s school, but her tough attitude seems to scare everyone away. Usagi quickly becomes friends with her.
programme.sub-title: Jupiter, the Powerful Girl in Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians grow in strength with its newest member Sailor Jupiter joining the team. Sailor Moon is appointed as team leader.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi learns that a transfer student named Ryo Urawa seems to have a crush on Ami, and tries to help him out.
programme.sub-title: Crushing on Ami: The Boy Who Can See the Future

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Naru attend an art exhibit by Yumemi Yumeno. Usagi and Mamoru are both asked by Yumemi to become models for her latest painting.
programme.sub-title: The Painting of Love: Usagi and Mamoru Get Closer

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and Makoto discover Motoki has a girlfriend named Reika. His relationship is in jeopardy due to Reika’s chance to study abroad.
programme.sub-title: Total Chaos: The Messy Love Rectangle

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Grandpa Hino has become emotionally unstable, causing Rei to worry. The new apprentice Yuichiro tries to cheer her up.
programme.sub-title: Grandpa Loses Control: Rei in Danger

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and friends meet a girl who they believe holds the final Rainbow Crystal. But they realize it’s her pet cat that possesses the Rainbow Crystal!
programme.sub-title: Loved and Chased: Luna's Worst Day Ever

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Umino seems to have fallen in love with Naru. Naru only considers Umino a friend, so Usagi decides to play Cupid and urges them to go on a date.

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: When the exploits of a Sailor Moon imposter become quite the sensation, the real Sailor Guardians step in to investigate.
programme.sub-title: Enter Venus, the Last Sailor Guardian

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Now that Sailor Venus has joined the team, all of the Sailor Guardians are finally together! Zoisite has discovered that Tuxedo Mask is Mamoru Chiba.
programme.sub-title: The Shining Silver Crystal: The Moon Princess Appears

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Tuxedo Mask is wounded while protecting Sailor Moon. The seven Rainbow Crystals gather and she is transformed into Serenity.
programme.sub-title: Returning Memories: Usagi and Mamoru's Past

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi is haunted by dreams of Tuxedo Mask, who has been abducted by the Dark Kingdom. Minako takes Usagi to a popular hair salon hoping it will help.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Confusion: Is Tuxedo Mask Evil?

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi decides to take the Princess Seminar course and the other Sailor Guardians join her. This is actually a trap set up by the Dark Kingdom.
programme.sub-title: Let's Become a Princess: Usagi's Bizarre Training

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi and her friends go to a ski resort to participate in the Moon Princess Contest, unaware that it’s Kunzite’s plan to eliminate the Moon Princess.
programme.sub-title: The Snow, the Mountains, Friendship and Monsters

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Figure-skating Janelyn & Misha offer to coach. Usagi and her friends decide to investigate. Makoto begins to receive personal lessons from Misha.
programme.sub-title: Paired with a Monster: Mako, the Ice Skating Queen

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Usagi goes on a family vacation, where she is unexpectedly reunited with Mamoru. But Mamoru no longer remembers Usagi or even who he really is.
programme.sub-title: The Legendary Lake Yokai: The Bond of Usagi's Family

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Dark Kingdom is trying to revive the Seven Great Monsters. Sailor Mercury and Jupiter scramble to protect Ryo Urawa.
programme.sub-title: I Won't Run Away from Love Anymore: Ami vs. Mamoru

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Minako receives a surprise visit from Katarina, Minako’s former partner. A tragic incident forced them to go their separate ways.
programme.sub-title: Sailor Venus's Past: Minako's Tragic Love

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon and the other Sailor Guardians appear to have a falling-out. But it’s all part of the plan to locate the enemy’s hideout.
programme.sub-title: Usagi Abandoned: The Falling-Out of the Sailor Guardians

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Venus finds the Dark Kingdom's hideout. The Sailor Guardians fall into Kunzite’s trap, which hurls them into the past.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Awakening: A Message from the Distant Past

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: The Sailor Guardians head into the Arctic Circle. Queen Beryl sends the DD Girls. The Sailor Guardians fall as they try to defeat the DD Girls.
programme.sub-title: Death of the Sailor Guardians: The Tragic Final Battle

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Sailor Moon attempts to free Endymion from Queen Beryl’s control. Sailor Moon is forced to fight the man she loves.
programme.sub-title: Usagi's Eternal Wish: A Brand New Life

programme.title: Sailor Moon
programme.desc: Having lost all memory of being Sailor Moon, Usagi now lives her life as an ordinary girl.

Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Dave Bautista, Alain Moussi, Gina Carano Diretor: John Stockwell

programme.title: O Franco-Atirador, (2015)

Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Michael Fassbender, Dominic West, Olga Kurylenko Diretor: Neil Marshall

programme.title: Fogo contra Fogo, (2020)

Ele entra no programa de proteção a testemunhas até depor, mas não pode se esconder por muito tempo da gangue, então decide agir por conta própria. Gêneros: Action & Adventure Elenco: Josh Duhamel, Bruce Willis, Rosario Dawson Diretor: David Barrett

Gêneros: Thriller Elenco: Kate Beckinsale, Scott Speedman, Michael Sheen Diretor: Len Wiseman

programme.title: Dupla em Fúria, (2013)

programme.title: A Menina e o Leão, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Mia é uma jovem de 14 anos que sempre teve uma profunda amizade com Charlie, um leão branco da fazenda de sua família. Um dia, seu pai decide vender o felino para caçadores de troféus e ela não vê outra opção além de fugir com Charlie para salvá-lo. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Norman - Confie em Mim, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Norman Oppenheimer é um picareta do mercado financeiro que tenta sua sorte na cidade de Nova York. Tentando ser amigo de todos, ele força seu caminho até se infiltrar no círculo interno de ricaços e de figurões da política. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Agente Mirim, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Quando sua mãe viaja, Olívia fica sob os cuidados do seu irmão mais velho, Miles. Quando Olivia testemunha um sequestro, ninguém acredita nela, nem mesmo seu irmão. Determinada a provar seu valor, a pequena decide investigar o crime por si só. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Nezha - Correndo pela Vida, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A equipe Lions de Fórmula 1 perde seu principal piloto e coloca em seu lugar o campeão do simulador de corrida Du Jieke. Com um oponente forte e conflitos a resolver, a equipe enfrenta uma batalha feroz. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Rei da Montanha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Espen Ash Lad, filho de um pobre agricultor, embarca em uma missão perigosa com seus irmãos para salvar a princesa de um vilão conhecido como o Rei da Montanha. O objetivo é ganhar uma recompensa e salvar a fazenda da sua família da ruína. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Viral, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Emma e sua irmã Stacey tinham uma vida normal de adolescente em uma cidade suburbana até que a disseminação de um vírus desconhecido forçou a cidade inteira a ficar em quarentena. Separadas dos pais, as duas jovens tentam sobreviver ao vírus. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Mal Está ao Seu Lado, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Um grupo de amigos decide fazer um jogo de espíritos. Em um círculo formado por cem velas, eles devem escolher uma delas e contar uma história de terror. Conforme as chamas são apagadas, eventos estranhos começam a acontecer. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: 6 Balas, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após uma missão de resgate mal-sucedida, o mercenário Samson Gália decide abandonar tudo, até ser chamado para uma última missão cujo objetivo é resgatar a filha de um lutador de MMA muito conhecido. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Crime e Desejo, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Agente do FBI chega a uma pequena cidade para investigar série de roubos a banco. Ele logo se aproxima de uma jovem viciada para obter informações, mas acaba se envolvendo com ela e vive um caso perigoso. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: Perseguição na Neve, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Veterano de guerra isolado na floresta encontra saco cheio de dinheiro durante caçada. Esconde rapidamente, mas não é o único que quer o dinheiro. Quando quatro criminosos armados chegam, o caçador vira presa. Gêneros: Action & Adventure

programme.title: O Jantar, (1970)

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após flagrar o beijo entre Juan Ramón e Michelle, Pilar entra em depressão, para de se arrumar e passa o tempo chorando. Juan Ramón a encontra nesse estado. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Amor Está por Aí, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Estefânia faz o teste de gravidez, mas não tem coragem de ver o resultado. Ela entrega o exame para Maca, que dá a notícia de que ela está grávida. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: North Hollywood, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Acabando a escola, um jovem precisa decidir entre o sonho de tornar-se skatista profissional ou ir para a faculdade como seu pai deseja. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Fall Girls, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Paige Davis acaba de ser promovida a representante de vendas em seu trabalho. Depois de uma noite de festa, Paige e suas amigas acordam e encontram sua chefe morta. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: S.O.S. Mulheres ao Mar 2, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. A bem-sucedida Adriana segue feliz em seu romance com André, que está prestes a lançar sua coleção durante um cruzeiro pelo Caribe. Ao saber que a ex-noiva dele vai acompanhá-lo, Adriana e suas fiéis escudeiras decidem embarcar no navio com eles. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O que Fazer?, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após saber que só tem 90 minutos de vida, por conta de um aneurisma no cérebro, um homem infeliz quer fazer as pazes com todos aqueles que foram magoados por ele. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Mundo Adulto, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Amy acaba de se formar e tem certeza de que seu destino é ser uma grande poetisa. Enquanto trabalha em uma sex shop, faz de tudo para conquistar a atenção de seu grande ídolo, o poeta Rat Billings, e se tornar sua protegida. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Três Ladrões e um Bebê, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O compulsivo jogador Slipper vê o sequestro do neto de um magnata como a salvação de suas dívidas. Quando, com seu senhorio e o oportunista Octopus, sequestram BB, sem saber, frustram os planos do crime organizado, que também está atrás da criança. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Os Mais Jovens, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Em um cenário apocalíptico pós-seca nos Estados Unidos, as pessoas chegam a matar por água. E, com o agravamento da crise, um adolescente acaba se tornando responsável por percorrer o planeta em busca de água. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Perseguido pelo Destino, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O gângster Gigi conhece a jovem e rica corredora Bibi. Logo, os dois se apaixonam, mas devido a suas vidas distintas, a chance de ficarem juntos é remota. Eles iniciam um relacionamento que põe em risco suas próprias vidas. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: O Destino de Grace, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Após prestar serviços militares, uma enfermeira retorna para a fazenda de sua avó em Amish Country, onde ela encontra um romance inesperado e se vê envolvida em um misterioso caso de assassinato. Gêneros: Entertainment

programme.title: Três Ladrões e um Bebê, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O compulsivo jogador Slipper vê o sequestro do neto de um magnata como a salvação de suas dívidas. Quando, com seu senhorio e o oportunista Octopus, sequestram BB, sem saber, frustram os planos do crime organizado, que também está atrás da criança. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Gangue Zip Zap, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Os irmãos gêmeos Zip e Zap são enviados para uma escola muito rígida. O diretor é um homem muito bravo e repudia qualquer forma de lazer. Cansados dessa situação, Zip e Zap formam um grupo para poder fazer suas travessuras e desafiar o diretor. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Todos os Caminhos Levam a Roma, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Maggie embarca em uma viagem para Itália, com Summer, sua filha adolescente. Mas ao chegar lá, Summer foge roubando o carro da mãe. Maggie contará com a ajuda de um ex-namorado para encontrar a filha. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: A Eterna Namorada, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Big Stone Gap é o lar de personagens charmosos e excêntricos. Ave Maria Mulligan, uma farmacêutica de 35 anos, é a solteirona da cidade. A vida de Ave vira de cabeça para baixo depois que ela descobre um segredo de família. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Uma Viagem para a Espanha, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Steve Coogan e Rob Brydon conhecem restaurantes e hotéis da costa espanhola, trocando piadas e impressões sobre seus almoços, conversando sobre paternidade, masculinidade e envelhecimento. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Evidências de um Crime, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. O policial Tom Cutler abandonou a profissão depois da morte da mulher para se concentrar em criar a filha Rose. Ele sobrevive limpando cenas de crime, mas um trabalho rotineiro acaba ameaçando a vida estável que construiu para si próprio e a filha. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Outra Vida, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma cientista desenvolve uma droga revolucionária que induz realidades virtuais e expande a sensação de tempo. O governo tenta assumir projeto, e agora ela precisa decidir como usar sua poderosa criação. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Jantar, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. À medida que dois casais jantam em um restaurante sofisticado, seus discursos educados disfarçam que eles estão lutando com questões familiares importantes. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Infidelidade, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Uma viagem de final de semana se transforma em um pesadelo quando um casal adúltero é obrigado a participar de um jogo doentio de sobrevivência com seu sequestrador. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: O Ninho, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Samuel é um menino paraplégico que mora com a mãe Elena em uma mansão isolada. Quando conhece Denise, uma empregada adolescente, ele finalmente encontra forças para se opor às restrições de sua mãe e se abrir para o mundo. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Sem Rastros, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Depois que uma menina desaparece de um parque de trailers, o pai e a mãe da garota decidem fazer justiça com as próprias mãos. A busca desesperada dos pais pela verdade acaba levando a uma revelação chocante. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: Um Acampamento do Barulho, (1970)
programme.desc: 1970. Encorajado pelo avô, Spence tenta aprender a lidar com seus medos e a fazer novos amigos em um acampamento cristão. Gêneros: Drama

programme.title: 2000. Os rapazes ficam entusiasmados com um circo e seus contorsionistas sensacionais e acabam tendo a ideia de criar seu próprio circo. programme.title: 2000. Cartman acha que é muito maduro para sair com Stan, Kyle e Kenny, e decide buscar novos amigos na internet, mas termina se metendo em vários problemas com pedófilos. programme.title: Naruto: Uma Derrota Digna - T01E47

programme.desc: 2022. Há um assassinato a bordo do navio que deveria transportar as pessoas resgatadas da Ilha Dotou, e Kyoho é o principal suspeito com base nas evidências. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Mariana Zink, Luiza Porto, Lucas Gama, Úrsula Bezerra, Robson Kumode, Tatiane Keplmair

programme.title: Naruto: Ataque Surpresa, A Arma Secreta do Naruto - T01E45
programme.sub-title: Ataque Surpresa, A Arma Secreta do Naruto
programme.desc: 2020. Depois de consumir Pílulas de Comida, os níveis de chakra de Kiba e Akamaru aumentam, e ambos começam a contra-atacar Naruto. Naruto usa Jutsu de Transformação contra Kiba e tenta ganhar com uma nova manobra secreta. O que será que Naruto planejou?! Gêneros: Anime

programme.title: Naruto: Uma Derrota Digna - T01E47
programme.desc: 2020. Hinata enfrenta Neji, mas ele ataca o ponto de pressão dela com Byakugan (olhos brancos). O fluxo de chakra de Hinata para, e ela quase perde a consciência. Ela encontra coragem ao lembrar como Naruto não desiste de nenhuma dificuldade. Gêneros: Anime

programme.sub-title: A Força Oculta De Lee: Um Jutsu Secreto Proibido

programme.sub-title: O Quinto Portão, Um Ninja Esplêndido

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Simulação - T01E38
programme.desc: 2007. Chega uma mensagem da Aldeia da Areia sobre o sequestro do Kazekage. Tsunade manda a equipe Kakashi para a aldeia. Kankuro começa a batalha contra os Akatsuki, mas as táticas dos bonecos não funcionam. Seu oponente foi quem desenvolveu essas táticas. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Ponte Tenchi - T01E39
programme.desc: 2007. Os ninjas tentam salvar Kankuro. Vovó Chiyo, perita em veneno, é chamada. Uma tempestade de areia atrasa Naruto, Sakura e Kakashi. Tsunade se preocupa e envia Guy e sua equipe. O akatsuki e Gaara começam o jutsu de selamento e os nove dragões fantasmas. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Nove Caudas Se Liberta - T01E40
programme.desc: 2007. Sakura trata Kankuro, deixando todos espantados com suas mãos firmes. Vovó Chiyo fica emocionada por Tsunade ter enviado sua própria aprendiz e pela determinação de Sakura. Kankuro fornece informações sobre os Akatsuki. Kakashi envia um cão de caça ninja. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Missão Super Secreta Se Inicia - T01E41
programme.sub-title: A Missão Super Secreta Se Inicia

Naruto e Sakura ficam chocados com a história das bestas de cauda. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Orochimaru Versus Jinchuriki - T01E42
programme.desc: 2008. A equipe Kakashi encontra Itachi Uchiha, de quem sofrera uma amarga derrota no passado. Guy e sua equipe começam a lutar contra um amargo rival, Kisame, que lança um poderoso chakra para subjugar o ninja da folha. Seu jutsu aprisiona Neji, Lee e Tenten. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Lágrimas De Sakura - T01E43
programme.desc: 2008. Guy se arrepende ao ver seus três alunos presos. Determinado a parar Kisame, Guy o desafia usando o nunchaku. Sem oxigênio, Tenten vai ficando fraca, e Guy se prepara para usar um jutsu secreto e proibido. Naruto cai no genjutsu de Itachi. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Segredo Da Batalha - T01E44
programme.desc: 2008. Vovó Chiyo e Sakura salvam Naruto do genjutsu de Itachi. Kakashi começa um contra-ataque e exibe toda sua destreza. Guy enfrenta dificuldades contra Kisame, mas o derrota com um poderoso jutsu. Os ninjas da folha conseguem derrotar seu arquiminigo. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: As Consequências Da Traição - T01E45
programme.desc: 2008. Kisame e Itachi parecem ter sido clones cujos poderes foram copiados por um jutsu de personificação. Vovó Chiyo explica a conexão entre a besta de cauda e o jinchuriki. Sakura percebe que Naruto enfrenta o mesmo destino e lágrimas escorrem em seu rosto. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Página Inacabada - T01E46
programme.desc: 2008. As equipes Kakashi e Guy fazem uma pausa. Quando a perseguição recomeça, Kakashi explica a Chiyo que Naruto também é um jinchuriki. Chiyo lamenta ter sido ela que selou o shukaku dentro de Gaara... Gaara é engolfado por uma luz branca. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Infiltração: O Covil Da Cobra! - T01E47
programme.desc: 2008. As equipes Kakashi e Guy chegam ao esconderijo dos akatsuki, mas são parados por uma barreira de cinco selos. Neji usa seu byakugan para localizar os selos e os ninjas destroem a barreira. Naruto tem uma visão chocante. A equipe Guy encara uma armadilha. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Laços - T01E48
programme.desc: 2008. Quebrar a barreira de cinco selos ativa uma armadilha, e a equipe Guy enfrenta cópias idênticas de si mesmos. Deidara e Sasori lutam para se apoderar do jinchuriki. Forçado a seguir Naruto, Kakashi pede que vovó Chiyo e Sakura não façam nada precipitado. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Algo Importante... - T01E49
programme.desc: 2008. A luta entre avó e neto começa. Para derrotar o verdadeiro Sasori dentro do boneco, Hiruko deve ser destruído primeiro. Só a própria avó consegue entender as armadilhas complexas de Sasori, mas é Sakura que deve dar o golpe final. Que estratégia usarão? programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A História Do Álbum Ilustrado - T01E50
programme.desc: 2008. Chiyo e Sakura expõem Sasori, que não envelheceu nada nos últimos vinte anos. Chiyo fica mais chocada com o segundo boneco que Sasori revela. Sasori foi quem planejou o desaparecimento do kazecage. Uma equipe ninja se dirige a um certo local. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Reencontro - T01E51
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura fica cercada por uma nuvem de veneno e usa um papel bomba para se livrar da fumaça. Ela tenta capturar Sasori para forçá-lo a dar informações sobre Orochimaru, invocando dois bonecos para esta batalha. Naruto e Kakashi ainda perseguem Deidara! programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Poder De Uchiha - T01E52
programme.desc: 2008. Os bonecos criados de humanos podem comandar o jutsu que o humano usava enquanto vivo. Assim, o boneco do terceiro kazekage converte chakras em poderes magnéticos. Chiyo e Sakura se protegem, Sasori faz um ataque implacável. Sakura toma uma decisão. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Título - T01E53
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura revida o ataque da areia de ferro. Ela rapidamente começa a ler os padrões de ataque do Sasori, que se prepara para usar seu chakra. O ataque da areia de ferro penetra o espaço, Sakura é atingida na mão e é infectada pelo veneno! programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Pesadelo - T02E54
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura destrói o boneco do terceiro kazekage graças a um antídoto que ela tomou e que funciona durante cerca de três minutos. Chiyo e Sakura decidem derrotar Sasori nesse prazo. Sasori usa seu último trunfo. Naruto e Kakashi planejam capturar Deidara. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Vento - T02E55
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura e Vovó Chiyo derrotam Sasori, mas ele acaba revivendo. Chiyo invoca bonecos com a técnica do ataque branco secreto, e Sasori aplica seu ataque vermelho secreto. O antídoto de Sakura perde efeito, mas ela e Chiyo iniciam uma decisiva batalha final! programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Contorção - T02E56
programme.desc: 2008. Vovó Chiyo usa o último antídoto em Sakura. Sasori tenta pôr fim à vida de Vovó Chiyo, mas ela revida e o derrota. Sakura é atingida em um lugar vital, e a única coisa que pode salvá-la é um jutsu que a Vovó Chiyo criou uma vez para Sasori. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Despertar Do Sono Eterno - T02E57
programme.desc: 2008. Os ninjas da equipe Guy se preocupam com o resultado da luta de Sakura e Vovó Chiyo enquanto enfrentam suas cópias, que permanecem firmes! programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Solidão - T02E58
programme.desc: 2008. Sakura corre para achar Naruto com Vovó Chiyo, sofrendo envenenada. Kakashi revela seu mangekyo sharingan, um poderoso jutsu que transporta tudo o que o olho pode ver para outra dimensão. Naruto finalmente consegue salvar Gaara, mas fica enfurecido ... programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Um Novo Inimigo - T02E59
programme.desc: 2008. Naruto perde o controle e o espírito da Raposa de Nove Caudas assume o comando. Kakashi consegue suprimir a Raposa de Nove Caudas. Deidara descobre a derrota de Sasori. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Impermanência - T02E60
programme.desc: 2008. Vovó Chiyo realiza o jutsu de ressuscitação em Gaara. Gaara acorda cercado por Naruto e os outros e também por uma multidão de ninjas da areia. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Contato - T02E61
programme.desc: 2008. Gaara e seus salvadores retornam à Aldeia de Areia. Após visitar o túmulo de Vovó Chiyo, Naruto e os ninjas da Folha têm que partir. Deidara aparece ferido na frente de Zetsu e Tobi. Na Aldeia da Folha, alguém tenta infiltrar um garoto na equipe Kakashi! programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Companheiro De Equipe! - T02E62
programme.desc: 2008. Kakashi é hospitalizado devido à tensão causada por seu mangekyo sharinga. Apesar dos apelos de Shizune para enviar outra equipe, Tsunade afirma que enviará a equipe Kakashi para fazer o trabalho. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Os Dois Reis - T02E63
programme.desc: 2008. Sai diz que ele e Naruto se encontrarão de novo e desaparece. Homura e Koharu dizem a Tsunade que Naruto não deve ser enviado em missões envolvendo a Akatsuki. Tsunade não concorda, então eles exigem que ela adicione um ninja recomendado por Danzo. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Sinal De Fogo Preto - T02E64

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Presa Na Escuridão - T02E65

Yamato decide que eles passarão a noite em uma pousada para tentar melhorar as relações entre os membros de sua equipe. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Almas Ressuscitadas - T02E66

Enquanto vão em direção à ponte Tenchi, eles se mantêm atentos contra qualquer emboscada. Yamato orienta sua equipe caso uma luta aconteça. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden - T02E67
programme.desc: 2008. Yamato faz uma simulação para avaliar as habilidades e técnicas de luta da equipe Kakashi. Sai abandona Naruto para concluir a missão simulada. programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Momento De Despertar - T02E68

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Desespero - T02E69

Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Marlowe Gardiner-Heslin, Alex Hood, Gage Knox Diretor: Mitsuo Hashimoto

programme.title: 2023. É o jogo do amor, quando o galã de Hollywood Jean-Claude Magnum desafia Mai para um duelo para ganhar sua mão em casamento! Será que Mai sucumbirá ao charme de Jean-Claude, para não mencionar sua esquadra de monstros-ninja? Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E31

programme.title: 2023. Que comecem os Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas! A habilidade e resistência dos oito finalistas serão testadas ao extremo em uma arena de duelos suspensa a 300 metros de altura! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E32

programme.title: 2023. É o primeiro dos Duelos Finais da Cidade de Batalhas, e Yugi luta contra o espírito maligno do Anel do Milênio, que possui Bakura! Yugi destrói os espectros grotescos de Bakura rapidamente, mas Bakura tem uma estratégia saída direto do cemitério... Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Revelado o Espírito Escuro: Yugi vs. Bakura, Parte 1
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E33

programme.title: 2023. Bakura aciona a Tábua do Destino, que fará Yugi perder automaticamente em cinco turnos! Como se isso já não fosse ruim, o Santuário das Trevas de Bakura afeta os pontos de vida de Yugi a cada ataque! Incapaz de atacar e ficando sem tempo, Yugi está preso! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Revelado o Espírito Escuro: Yugi vs. Bakura, Parte 2
programme.desc: Yu-Gi-Oh! - T02E34

programme.title: 2023. Slifer, o Dragão Celeste de Yugi expelirá seu último sopro e vencerá o duelo, mas Bakura poderá não sobreviver a rajada do todo-poderoso Monstro Deus Egípcio! Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Toru Yamada, Hiroyuki Kakudo, Kunihisa Sugishima
programme.sub-title: Revelado o Espírito Escuro: Yugi vs. Bakura, Parte 3
